This varies from the unique distribution of A-brand vision components to the development of customer specific vision systems for food, robot and sport applications. 

Investment in technological innovation is key to DVC. Through DVC, the customers will benefit directly of the latest developments in the vision market. Partnership is paramount in our close cooperation with OEMs and system integrators.

DVC’s VAIM modules are created for machine builders whose core business doesn’t include the development and production of a camera inspection system.

allDescriptions: Group of companies in the area of control and automation technology with headquarter in Esslingen am Neckar

Festo was founded in 1925 by Albert Fezer and Gottlieb Stoll in Esslingen am Neckar, Germany., initially specializing in wood-processing machinery. The company was named after its founders Albert Fezer and Gottlieb Stoll.

Festo is a global player and an independent family-owned company with headquarters in Esslingen am Neckar, Germany. Festo has set standards in industrial automation technology and technical education ever since its establishment, thereby making a contribution to sustainable development of the environment, the economy and society. The company supplies pneumatic and electrical automation technology to 300,000 customers of factory and process automation in over 35 industries. The LifeTech sector with medical technology and laboratory automation is becoming increasingly important. The products and services are available in 176 countries. With about 20,700 employees in over 250 branch offices in 61 countries worldwide, Festo achieved a turnover of around €3.36 billion in 2021. Each year around 7% of this turnover is invested in research and development. In this learning company, 1.5 % of turnover is invested in basic and further training. Festo Didactic SE is a leading provider of technical education and training and offers its customers worldwide comprehensive digital and physical learning solutions in the industrial environment.

Festo is a leading global manufacturer of pneumatic and electromechanical systems, components and controls for process control and factory automation solutions, with more than 55 national headquarters serving over 180 countries.
Celebrating over 40 years of innovation in the United States and over 80 years globally, Festo has continuously elevated the state of manufacturing with innovations and optimized motion control solutions that deliver higher performing, more profitable automated manufacturing and processing equipment.
Our dedication to the advancement of automation extends beyond technology to the education of current and future automation and robotic designers with simulation tools, teaching programs, and on-site services.
FESTO is a privately owned German industrial control and automation company based in Esslingen am Neckar, Germany.

FESTO develops and markets solutions for pneumatic and electrical factory automation. The company offers pneumatic drives, servo-pneumatic positioning systems, electromechanical drives, motors and controllers, grippers, handling systems, vacuum technology solutions, valves, valve terminals, sensors, image processing systems, pneumatic fittings systems, electrical connector technology solutions, control technology, and software solutions.

Festo Oy Ab manufactures and distributes industrial automation systems, equipment, and parts. The Company markets its products to shipping and manufacturing companies throughout Finland and internationally.

Official channel of Festo Portugal.

Festo is a global provider of automation solutions using pneumatic technology, electronics and networks for all types of industrial processes and activities. We provide independent components as well as complete systems, and also consulting and technological and business training.

Our goal is for our clients to achieve maximum productivity and competitiveness in the automation of manufacturing plants and processes.

About A FESTO-AM Kft. piacvezető Magyarországon az ipari automatizálásban. Pneumatikus és elektronikus automatizálási termékeket, komplett rendszereket gyártunk. Az esslingeni Festo 1925-ben kezdte meg működését és az 50-es évektől kezdve bővítette ki gyártási profilját pneumatikus elemekkel. Mára a Festo az ipari autom ... atizálási rendszerek fejlesztése és gyártása kapcsán piacvezető szerepet tölt be. A világ 61 országában, több mint 250 kirendeltségben, közel 16 200 munkatársunk dolgozik azon, hogy vevőink elérjék üzleti céljaikat, melyhez mi közel 30 000 katalógus termékkel és nagy számú egyedileg konfigurált vevői termékekkel járulunk hozzá. A FESTO-AM Kft., a németországi Festo magyarországi leányvállalataként 24 éve kezdte meg működését Budapesten, és ezen idő alatt a Festo 3. legnagyobb gyártó bázisává nőtte ki magát. Cégünk a sűrítettlevegő-előkészítő egységek, vákuumgenerátorok és a legkorszerűbb biztonsági kapcsolószelepek gyártójává és kompetencia központjává fejlődött a Festo globális gyártási, logisztikai és fejlesztési hálózatán belül. Termékpalettánk az elmúlt években szelepekkel, proporcionális szabályozókkal és munkahengerekkel, valamint vevőspecifikus gyártmányokkal bővült. A vállalat 2015-re már elérte a közel 900 fős létszámot, az elkövetkezendő években pedig további beruházásokat és bővítéseket hajtunk végre. Így mind a vállalat létszámát, mind pedig területét lehetőségünk lesz tovább növelni. See More

Festo AG & Co. KG manufactures factory and process automation solutions. The company offers pneumatic, electrical control, and drive technology solutions. Its products include cylinders, valves, and manifolds; electrical, pneumatic, and servo-pneumatic drives; appliances for compressed-air treatment and vacuum technology; grippers and handling systems; motors and controllers; sensors and image-processing systems; and control technology and software solutions. The company also provides process automation safety products, such as control technology and remote Input and output systems, valve terminals and pilot valves, sensors and positioners, linear and quarter turn actuators, process and medi...

Festo Corporation manufactures pneumatic and electromechanical systems, components, and controls for process control and factory automation solutions. Its product line includes pneumatic actuators, servo-pneumatic control components, electromechanical drives, motors and controllers, grippers, handling systems, vacuum technology, valves, valve manifolds, sensors, image processing systems, compressed air preparation, air supply components, electric cables and connectors, control technology and software, other pneumatic equipment, process automation, ready-to-install solutions, and function-specific systems. The company also provides a range of services from initial planning to system moderniza...

Festo AG manufactures industrial automation systems. The company offers pneumatic and electrical control and drive technology solutions. Its products include cylinders, valves, and manifolds; electrical, pneumatic, and servo-pneumatic drives; appliances for compressed-air treatment and vacuum technology; grippers and handling systems; motors and controllers; sensors and image-processing systems; and control technology and software solutions. The company was founded in 1956 and is based in Lupfig, Switzerland. Festo AG operates as a subsidiary of Festo AG & Co. KG.
Manufacturers of pneumatic and hydraulic equipment.

Festo Corporation is a provider of pneumatic and electrical automation technologies for the production, transportation and disposal of gases, fluids and bulk materials. The organization serves the beverage, milk and meat processing, bakery, confectionery, pharmaceutical, cosmetic and packaging industries. Festo Corporation operates a body shop that offers a range of compact cylinders and valves. It provides assembly, installation, system servicing and maintenance services, as well as drawing circuit diagrams. Its assembly products include various controllers and accessories and automation components. The company also provides flat panels, production plants, and pneumatic aluminum and stainless steel cylinders. Festo Corporation maintains one of its locations in Hauppauge, N.Y.

entity.name: CIMS
entity.description: CIMS provides automated optical inspection solutions dedicated to enhancing production processes and yield in Printed Circuit Board (PCB), High Density Interconnect PCB (HDI PCB), Flex and Rigid-flex PCB and IC Substrates.CIMS addresses specific needs of all segments of PCB manufacturing industry with dedicated solutions based on advanced imaging and image processing technologies. CIMS solutions are applied to wide range of applications across those segments at multiple stages of PCB manufacturing process.
allDescriptions: Cims is one of the global market leaders in PCB(printed circuit board) automatic optical inspection(AVI).

CIMS provides automated optical inspection solutions dedicated to enhancing production processes and yield in Printed Circuit Board (PCB), High Density Interconnect PCB (HDI PCB), Flex and Rigid-flex PCB and IC Substrates.CIMS addresses specific needs of all segments of PCB manufacturing industry with dedicated solutions based on advanced imaging and image processing technologies. CIMS solutions are applied to wide range of applications across those segments at multiple stages of PCB manufacturing process.

CIMS provides automated optical inspection solutions, automated final/visual inspection solutions, metrology and add-on inspection options, system upgrade solutions as well as technical support and service dedicated to enhancing production processes and yield in Printed Circuit Board (PCB), High Density Interconnect PCB (HDI PCB), Flex and Rigid-flex PCB and IC Substrates.

CIMS addresses specific needs of all segments of PCB (including IC substrates) manufacturing industry with dedicated solutions based on advanced imaging and image processing technologies. CIMS solutions are applied to wide range of applications across those segments at multiple stages of PCB manufacturing process.

CIMS Website：www.cims.com
CIMS official Wechat account：CIMSChina

allDescriptions: EKB is a system integrator in industrial automation that specializes in cyber security, robotics, machines and artificial intelligence.

EKB is een systeem integrator op het gebied van industriële automatisering. Met 210 betrokken en deskundige medewerkers bieden wij automatiseringsoplossingen voor de Nederlandse industrie. Met vestigingen in Beverwijk, Drachten, Haaksbergen, Houten en Someren zijn wij één van de grotere systeem integratoren in Nederland en met een landelijke Service Desk staan wij 24/7 voor onze opdrachtgevers klaar! Vanuit de vijf vestigingen worden de volgende specialismen ingezet: - Procesautomatisering - Aandrijftechniek - PLC/SCADA - Machine Vision - Robotica - Alarm Management / HP HMI - EMI (MES/OEE) - Motion & Control - PLC Brander Besturing - Service & Onderhoud - Panelenbouw - Machinebekabeling - Machineveiligheid - Motor Control Centers (TABULA)
Ekb-Servis OOO was founded in 2007. The Company's line of business includes the marketing of semifinished metal products.

allDescriptions: LEWA is a worldwide leading manufacturer of diaphragm metering pumps, process pumps, complete metering systems and plants. The company was founded in 1952. We have grown since our founding in 1952 and are now represented by 14 subsidiaries and over 80 sales partners on every continent. LEWA offers customized solutions, with a focus on taking a comprehensive approach to pump and system integration and on the process itself. LEWA’s core expertise includes first class service and spare part distribution in aftersales combined with many years of experience in the international project management.
LEWA designs and manufactures metering and process pumps, metering devices, and systems for fluid metering.

LEWA designs and manufactures metering and process pumps, metering devices, and systems for fluid metering. It offers metering, process, centrifugal, and air operated pumps, as well as pump navigators; chemical injection packages; pump skids; bellows pulsators; odorizing systems; chromatography and blowing agent metering systems; and customized production units and metering systems. The company offers products for additive metering for plastics, amine treatment, process chromatography, fabric softener, corrosion inhibitor, inline caustic dilution, methanol injection, waste water wet oxidation, polyethylene production, foaming agent metering, supercritical fluid, H2S and CO2 injection applications in oil and gas, gas odorization, refinery, petrochemical, chemical, plastic, personal care, cleaning and detergent, pharma and biotech, food and beverage, energy utility, and other industries. LEWA was founded in 1952 and is based in Leonberg, Germany with representatives and sales offices in Germany and internationally.
Company

LEWA is a manufacturer of diaphragm metering pumps, process pumps as well as customized metering systems and production units. The company has developed from a pure technology provider to a solution provider over the last years. LEWA systems are in use in oil & gas and chemical industry.

LEWA GmbH manufactures diaphragm metering and process diaphragm pumps, as well as complete metering systems. The Company offers solutions to oil and gas, refineries, chemicals, plastics, food and beverages, and petrochemical industry. LEWA also provides services including consulting, project management, engineering, and maintenance services. LEWA serves customers worldwide.

LEWA is a world-leading brand offering metering pumps, process diaphragm pumps, and complete metering systems. We produce cutting-edge engineering solutions to fulfil a vast array of metering, conveyance and mixing requirements. With our innovative technologies critical to safety and efficiency, we support our customers in the production of petrochemicals, chemicals and detergents, plastics, cosmetics, and the pharmaceutical and food & beverage sectors. Other specialist applications include biotechnology, energy solutions, and gas odorization. 

LEWA is part of the Atlas Copco Group, a globally leading Swedish industrial corporation for compressed air and vacuum solutions, energy solutions, dewatering and industrial pumps, industrial power tools and assembly and machine vision solutions.

LEWA Australia Pty Ltd is a sales office located in Perth handling Australia and Oceania regions’ markets.

As a pump and systems provider, we are specialized in metering pumps, process diaphragm pumps, pump packages, chemical injection packages and production units applicable to various industries of your need including oil & gas, mining, petrochemical, refineries, dairy and the general industry.
Please do not hesitate to contact us for more information and solution on you needs.

Since 2022, the company has been part of the Atlas Copco Group, a globally leading Swedish industrial corporation for compressed air and vacuum solutions, energy solutions, dewatering and industrial pumps, industrial power tools and assembly and machine vision solutions. Together with Atlas Copco Group, LEWA will further expand its industrial pump business.

entity.name: MBJ Imaging
entity.description: MBJ Imaging develops and manufactures LED lighting and controller systems for industrial machine vision applications. Its products include ringlights, barlights, backlights, toplights, spotlights, coaxial and dome lights, and pattern projectors. The SL-Series and SRL-Series are high-power lighting options designed for use at different object distances. The company also provides LED controllers, such as the CTR series, which support modes including steady, dimmable, triggered, and flash light. These products are used for visual inspection tasks involving reflective and transparent surfaces.
allDescriptions: MBJ Imaging offers LED lighting and controllers for industrial machine vision applications.

MBJ Imaging develops and manufactures LED lighting and controller systems for industrial machine vision applications. Its products include ringlights, barlights, backlights, toplights, spotlights, coaxial and dome lights, and pattern projectors. The SL-Series and SRL-Series are high-power lighting options designed for use at different object distances. The company also provides LED controllers, such as the CTR series, which support modes including steady, dimmable, triggered, and flash light. These products are used for visual inspection tasks involving reflective and transparent surfaces.

MBJ Imaging GmbH, founded end of 2013 and started its business operations in 2014, specializes in the development, manufacturing and sales of innovative LED lighting and LED controllers for the automation industry.

Illumination is a core component for industrial image processing and critical to the performance of an inspection system. MBJ Imaging has set itself the goal of offering reliable, industrial-suited and also cost-efficient standard lighting based on the latest LED technologies.

Corresponding accessories like optical filters and matching holders allow simple and cost-saving integration into any automation systems. If required, customized solutions can also be realized.

allDescriptions: Boll Automation is an innovative & effective system integrator when it comes to integrating robot-assisted systems for industrial automation

Boll Automation GmbH ist Teil einer mittelständische Firmengruppe, der Autision Group GmbH, im Bereich automatisierter Prüfsysteme. Unser Firmenverbund bietet Robotik, Machine Vision und optische Messtechnik unter einem Dach. Unsere Kernkompetenz ist die Verbindung aus Automation & Vision, daher kommt der Name: Autision. Die Kernkompetenz der Robotikspezialisten von Boll Automation liegen in der Kombination aus Robotik und intelligenter Bildverarbeitung für industrielle Anwendungen. Durch die einzigartige Verbindung von Robotik mit optischer Messtechnik und Inspektion liefern wir maßgeschneiderte Roboterlösungen entlang Ihrer gesamten Wertschöpfungskette: Vom roboterbasierten Greifen, über roboterbasierte Qualitätssicherung durch Prüfen und Messen, zum Nacharbeiten mit Robotern bis zum automatisierten Palettieren. Ziel unserer Arbeit ist die Automatisierung, Qualitätssicherung und Prozessoptimierung für unsere Kunden. Robotergestützte Automatisierungs- und Oberflächenprüfsysteme von Boll Automation stellen sicher, dass Ihre Fertigung kosteneffizient - mit hoher technischer Verfügbarkeit - produziert. http://www.bollautomation.de/de/impressum/index.html

entity.description: ATHENAIS SA develops AI-based systems for automated visual inspection and predictive analytics in industrial environments. The company offers defect detection solutions that optimize Cognex ViDi and Halcon MVTec configurations from customer OK/NOK image sets using an unsupervised hyperoptimization approach. Its AIS platform supports deployment of automatic optical inspection systems with configurable hardware such as lenses, cameras, inkers, and illumination. ATHENAIS SA also provides predictive analytics tools for anomaly detection in IoT and other operational signals. The portfolio includes MAP Pilot for image collection and MAP Inspect for manual image tagging and labeling by client quality teams or Athenais specialists.

allDescriptions: ATHENAIS SA develops AI-based automated optical inspection, defect detection, and predictive analytics systems for industrial applications.

ATHENAIS SA develops AI-based systems for automated visual inspection and predictive analytics in industrial environments. The company offers defect detection solutions that optimize Cognex ViDi and Halcon MVTec configurations from customer OK/NOK image sets using an unsupervised hyperoptimization approach. Its AIS platform supports deployment of automatic optical inspection systems with configurable hardware such as lenses, cameras, inkers, and illumination. ATHENAIS SA also provides predictive analytics tools for anomaly detection in IoT and other operational signals. The portfolio includes MAP Pilot for image collection and MAP Inspect for manual image tagging and labeling by client quality teams or Athenais specialists.

Welcome to the new era of Automated Optical Inspection with deep learning.
contact@athenais.tech

Athenais Defects Detection and Predictive Analytics Systems
** Enhance your productivity with our Cognex Vidi / Halcon MvTec HyperOptimization software
- From your OK/NOK set of images our unsupervised HyperOptimization system will find the best Vidi or Halcon solution
- An AI driven approach that will beat all others parameters search.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
** Deploy your Automatic Optical Inspection system with our AIS plateform
- The lowest COO of AOI systems worlwide thanks to the Open Hardware concept
- Automatic turret with Mitutoyo BF/DF lens, APC Basler Camera, Xandex Inker and totally configurable illuminations
- MapPilot Client server architecture compatible with Cognex Vidi / Vision Pro and Halcon MvTec
- Capture images, detect defects, measure and inspect automatically
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
** Boost your business or process with our Predictive Analytic toolset
- Looking for anomalies signal detection in your IOT/System?
- Looking for Predictive Analytics?

entity.description: SWEEPER’s main objective is to put the first generation greenhouse harvesting robots onto the market. Until now this has never been achieved and it will ensure Europe’s leading role in agricultural robotics.  In modern greenhouses there is a high demand to automate labour. The availability of a skilled workforce that accepts repetitive tasks in the harsh climate conditions of a greenhouse is decreasing rapidly. The current state of the art in automated harvesting of fruits and vegetables has remained remarkably stationary in the past decades. In the EU-FP7-project CROPS (www.crops-robots.eu) extensive research has been performed on agricultural robotics. One of the applications was a sweet pepper harvesting robot. SWEEPER will use the technology developed in CROPS to introduce, test and validate a robotic harvesting solution for sweet pepper under real-world conditions.  The project involves 6 partners from 4 different countries (The Netherlands, Belgium, Sweden and Israel). The consortium consist out of fundamental and applied research organisations, a system integrator and a modern grower of sweet pepper. In the consortium a wide-range of disciplines are available, including: horticulture, horticultural engineering, machine vision, sensing, robotics, control, intelligent systems, software architecture, system integration and greenhouse crop management.

allDescriptions: Visco Technologies is a manufacturing company that develops, manufactures, sells, and maintains machine vision and image processing systems.
Visco Technologies is a development, manufacture, sales and maintenance of image processing systems.

ViSCO Technologies Corporation engages in the development, manufacture, sale, and maintenance of machine vision systems in Japan and internationally. It offers machine vision systems related peripheral equipment, including cameras, super focusing cameras, NIR cameras, digital camera cables, lighting controllers, coaxial lighting adapters, and flashlight controllers. The company also provides conceptual equipment, such as MUSOU, an omnidirectional inspection system; and JIGEN, a multi-axle system. It serves semiconductor, electronic parts, automobiles, plastics, robots, sundries, and pharmaceutical industries. The company was incorporated in 2003 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. As of October 3, 2024, ViSCO Technologies Corporation operates as a subsidiary of Mitsubishi Electric Corporation.
We sell/support VTV-9000 Series, an advanced Machine Vision System of ViSCO Technologies, a Japan's leading company of image processing technology. We cover Thailand and other ASEAN area mainly.

Development, manufacture, sales, maintenance of Machine Vision System We are an expert team on vision processing and inspection technology. We are focused on Vision technology and Collaborate with customers, technology, and equipment from various industries to create new value. We are a team that enjoys discovering and working with new Technologies. Our company name ViSCO Technologies was derived from these concepts. ViSCO Technologies is not only a machine vision systems manufacturer but also a development-based engineering company that offers comprehensive consulting services based on its rich knowledge and experience regarding image processing algorithms, optical technology, electronics, and machinery.

ViSCO Technologies Corporation manufactures electronic components. The Company produces semiconductors, solid state devices, and other equipment. ViSCO Technologies also develops image processing systems.
Manufacturer of image processing equipment

entity.description: Saki Corporation develops, manufactures, and sells inspection equipment. The Company produces automated optical and X-ray inspection system for printed circuit board assemblies, semiconductor package, or power module. Saki conducts business worldwide.

partnerships.summary: Japanese conglomerate started as photographic film manufacturer
partnerships.name: FUJIFILM Holdings

allDescriptions: Saki is a manufacturer of automated electronic assembly inspection equipment specializing in printed circuit boards, and power modules.

Global top brand supplier for  SPI, AOI and AXI. 

Since its establishment in 1994, Saki Corporation has, in a short period of time, acquired a worldwide position in the field of automatic visual-inspection equipment for electronic parts mounting processes utilize robotic vision technology. The Company has achieved this important goal guided by the motto embodied in its corporate principle — “Challenging the creation of new value.”

The Company customer satisfaction, product quality, and employee satisfaction, all high priorities and has incorporated these into its comprehensive management plan. Incorporating the spirit of these priorities into its strategies for worldwide expansion, Saki has continued to maintain stable growth over the long term with an aim to securing the top position in the global market for its brand name products.

In the 21st century, the robotics industry will play a key role in the development of the global economy. Saki Corporation will endeavor to promote the development of this new industry designed for a new age and in achieving this goal increase its contribution to societies around the world.

allDescriptions: Fizyr enables the automating of human tasks in logistics using AI. Their deep learning algorithm adds a layer of understanding, bringing autonomous decision making to processes that involve classifying, quality control*, counting, picking and manipulating.
Vision software-with native AI and machine learning capabilities, solving the most difficult automation problems

Fizyr enables the automating of human tasks in logistics using AI.  Their deep learning algorithm adds a layer of understanding, bringing autonomous decision making to processes that involve classifying, quality control*, counting, picking and manipulating.
Forks by Fizyr. Artificial intelligence for vision guided robotics. We're hiring! https://fizyr.com/careers/
Artificial intelligence for vision guided robotics. We're hiring! https://fizyr.com/careers/

Computer vision software- with native artificial intelligence and machine learning - built for picking & stacking items, parcels, depalletizing and trailer unloading. Fizyr designs, builds, installs, and maintains an unmatched vision software product for automated picking & stacking items, parcels, depalletizing, and trailer unloading. Our deep learning algorithms are used to enable automated handling of unknown objects varying in shape, size, color, material, and stacking, being picked from (conveyed) bulk. Fizyr’s product is applied in production all over the world by leading system integrators and end-users, in online retail, warehousing and parcel services.  

We started in 2014 as ‘Delft Robotics’, a TU Delft spin-off founded by Professor Martijn Wisse, as a system integrator building robotic picking cells. In 2016, we participated in and won both competitions of the Amazon Picking challenge, mainly due to our track record in applying deep learning. This led to the company pivoting towards a deep learning computer vision software-only product and re-branding to Fizyr in 2017.  

Our Plug-and-Play modular product allows for a smooth integration with any system. We give integrators the freedom to choose the best hardware for their picking cell and we help them configure it, while facilitating cost, robustness, and speed optimization. Our algorithms provide over 100 grasp poses each second, including classification to handle objects differently, but also perform quality controls and detect defects to prevent damaged items from being placed on a sorter.  

Leading integrators across the globe acknowledged our product’s high quality and used it in production. This is what makes us truly unique; we were trusted as a strategic partner and grew successfully bootstrapped since the beginning. Up to this day, we remain dedicated to creating true value for our partners, so that they can create cutting-edge logistics solutions for their clients.

SCHULZ specializes in developing automation solution, and offer its services in drive technology, image processing, robotics, and much more.
SCHULZ Systemtechnik GmbH is currently one of the leading developers of automation solutions for various industries.

Founded in 1954 in Lower Saxony Visbek (Germany), the SCHULZ Systemtechnik GmbH is currently one of the leading developers of automation solutions for various industries. The company combines all three disciplines of automation technology - mechanics, electrical engineering and software - to offer the entire value-added chain from a single source. Specially tailored solutions are developed to meet the individual customer's needs, whether for a medium-sized business or a large-scale corporation. Extensive synergies within the company group as well as comprehensive knowledge of and expertise in the various sectors and their technologies are essential advantages. In order to sustainably change its customers'​ manufacturing processes, the Hightech Strategy Industry 4.0 is simultaneously the technology leader's goal as well as its vision, and can already be found in current products. This internationally operating Group of Companies employs more than 1,000 employees at various locations worldwide.

entity.name: PlatiScan
entity.description: PlatiScan VI provides automated optical inspection systems for industrial quality control and defect detection.
allDescriptions: PlatiScan VI provides automated optical inspection systems for industrial quality control and defect detection.

PlatiScan VI Automated Optical Inspection

Mit PlatiScan VI wurde ein neuartiges optisches Inspektionssystem (engl. visual inspection system) entwickelt.

Das System besteht aus einem handelsüblichen Windows-PC auf dem unsere spezielle Software installiert ist, die zur Auswertung der Bilder dient und die Bilderfassung wird realisiert durch eine herkömmliche Digitalkamera in einer individuell gewünschten Konfiguration als "Standalone" oder "Integrated" System.

Unser PlatiScan VI System wurde der menschlichen Vorgehensweise einer manuellen Sichtprüfung nachgebildet, so kann eine manuelle Sichtprüfung per Computer automatisiert werden. Hierdurch wird die Fehlererkennungsrate und die gesamte Testabdeckung deutlich erhöht.

Unter anderem sind bereits heute folgende Applikationen realisiert worden:

    * Board-Check
    * LED-Check
    * Display-Check
    * Jet-Test

Natürlich sind mit dem PlatiScan VI System auch andere Anwendungsgebiete möglich.
Sprechen Sie uns doch einfach heute noch an und lassen Sie sich über die Lösung Ihrer individuellen Testbedürfnisse beraten.

allDescriptions: As part of CXV Global, we offer a powerful platform of combined technologies and professional services that optimise life sciences’ and high-end operations such as logistics, costmetics and automotive across product development, manufacturing, packaging and distribution. Key features include: -A comprehensive portfolio of innovative automation solutions and digitisation capabilities encompassing machine vision, serialisation, digitisation, and resourcing for R&D and manufacturing sites -An extensive global network anchored by a strong presence in two of the world’s largest life sciences markets: Europe and the U.S. -24×7 production activity and multi-site, multi-national and multi-lingual project support spanning 10 time zones -High-touch service from a global workforce of 500+ employees possessing deep technical and engineering expertise For more information visit www.cxvglobal.com

VistaLink is a machine vision system integrator with more than 25 years of experience in the field of industrial image processing using vision technology. 

VistaLink has acquired extensive knowledge having served customers across multiple industries including automotive, pharmaceutical, medical devices, cosmetic and logistics & distribution. As well as supplying turn-key solutions, VistaLink has provided solutions to reoccurring customer challenges. We now count some of the world’s largest brands among our key clients,  serving them successfully across Europe for many years.

VistaLink is committed to putting the customer first. To that end, we can offer the services of a highly experienced team of engineers, first class support throughout projects and the comfort of working in any of six major languages. Headquarters centrally located in Belgium with offices in Scandinavia and the UK. To ensure durable, high quality solutions, VistaLink integrates and supplies only the finest of hardware and software products from AntaresVison, Cognex & Siemens.

Our competences:

-    Size testing
-    Surface inspection

-    3D examination
-    OCR examination (Optical Character Recognition)

Everything from a single source.

allDescriptions: 36ZEROVision is an AI-powered visual inspection system developed to identify and solve a wide range of manufacturing quality issues. It offers fully automated error tracking and identification for optimized manufacturing agility and quality, factory throughput, and capital spending.

We are revolutionizing the quality assurance and inspection ecosystem by placing the capabilities of AI at the fingertips of our users. At 36ZERO VISION we believe in smart manufacturing through a technology-driven approach that radically improves quality control with less resources – making it accessible to any manufacturer. Our unique and robust algorithm can be set up by any user in a matter of clicks to identify defects on a pixel level. 36ZERO Vision radically improves quality assurance, productivity and give manufacturers a piece of mind.
AI for visual Quality Control
36ZERO Vision is an AI-powered visual inspection software used to identify manufacturing quality issues.

Founded and based in Munich, 36ZERO Vision is revolutionizing visual inspection in manufacturing with its advanced, software-defined Vision OS platform. By leveraging proprietary AI technology, the company provides unmatched accuracy and operational efficiency, serving leading global manufacturers and helping ensure quality control excellence across multiple industrial sectors.

entity.description: Q.VITEC is a company that operates in the hardware, industrial, and software sectors. It provides solutions in the field of industrial image processing. The company offers intelligent software, reliable hardware, and customized system integration. One of its products, V.Q Assemble, is a camera and beamer supported inspection software for assembly processes. It is designed for both end users and system houses for industrial image processing who want to implement inspection solutions. allDescriptions:
In vieler Hinsicht besonders

Hervorgegangen aus einem der größten Elektronikkonzerne der Welt, versteht sich Q.VITEC als Lösungsanbieter in allen Fragen der industriellen Bildverarbeitung. Auf diesem Feld überzeugen wir mit intelligenter Software, verlässlicher Hardware und einer maßgeschneiderten Systemintegration.

Philosophie

Je komplexer die täglichen Herausforderungen, je höher die eigenen Erwartungen und größer die Ansprüche an die geleistete Arbeit sind, desto wichtiger werden Erfahrung und das richtige Know-how. Wir wissen nicht nur um die Vielschichtigkeit der industriellen Bildverarbeitung, wir sind uns auch über das nahezu grenzenlose Potential dieser Technologie im Klaren.
Q.VITEC is an image processing solution company that provides software, hardware, and system integration services for the industrial sector.

Q.VITEC is a company that operates in the hardware, industrial, and software sectors. It provides solutions in the field of industrial image processing. The company offers intelligent software, reliable hardware, and customized system integration. One of its products, V.Q Assemble, is a camera and beamer supported inspection software for assembly processes. It is designed for both end users and system houses for industrial image processing who want to implement inspection solutions. Q.VITEC also has a subsidiary, Q.VITEC (INDIA) PRIVATE LIMITED, to integrate its software, Vision Q.400, into the Indian market.

allDescriptions: Zumbach Electronics is an e-commerce company that provides industrial gauging, process control, and data acquisition technology solutions.
ZUMBACH Electronic AG is a manufacturer of on-line measuring, monitoring and control systems. We are spe­cial­ized in non-con­tact meas­ur­ing tech­no­logy.

ZUMBACH ELECTRONICS is a world-leading manufacturer of in-line measuring systems for industrial applications. We provide the most accurate, reliable, and comprehensive industrial gauging, process control, and quality/production data acquisition technology. With our extensive process and industry knowledge, we offer cost-effective solutions that help manufacturers achieve operational excellence.

ZUMBACH instruments precisely measure diameter, ovality, wall thickness, concentricity, cross section, shape, capacitance, and more. Zumbach also provides fault detection systems, inductive preheaters for metal conductors, spark testers for in-line testing of the dielectric, optical surface inspection systems, in-line profile monitoring systems, data acquisition, and FFT analysis.

Leading manufacturers around the world have integrated Zumbach systems into their processes to increase output, reduce material costs and downtime, improve safety, and control quality. Zumbach systems provide quality improvements in manufacturing through tighter tolerances, better transmission capabilities, and improved workflow

Zumbach’s leadership is built on its expertise in various technologies including lasers/optics, ultrasonic, x-ray, high-voltage technology, computer hardware and software, and more. Numerous international patents and trademarks demonstrate Zumbach’s strength in innovation.

ZUMBACH ELECTRONIC ist einer der führenden Hersteller von Online-Messsystemen für den in-dustriellen Einsatz. Wir liefern präzise, zuverlässige, innovative und maßgeschneiderte Produktlö-sungen. Unseren Fokus legen wir auf die Kundenzufriedenheit und die Bedürfnisse der verschie-denen Branchen.

ZUMBACH ist ein Schweizer Familienunternehmen das 1957 von Bruno Zumbach gegründet wurde und heute von seinem Sohn Rainer Zumbach geführt wird. Der Hauptsitz des Unternehmens be-findet sich in Orpund im Nordwesten der Schweiz. Weltweit gewährleisten kompetente Fachleute in 11 Tochtergesellschaften und mehr als 40 Vertretungen einen zuverlässigen Kundenservice.

Unsere Messlösungen garantieren unseren Kunden eine umfassende Qualitätssicherung, Pro-zessoptimierung und Protokollierung ihrer Produktion. Dank unserer langjährigeren Erfahrung und unserem Know-how können wir rentable und innovative Lösungen anbieten. Wir arbeiten nach hohen Qualitätsstandards und sind ISO 9001:2015 zertifiziert.

Führende Hersteller weltweit haben Zumbach-Systeme in ihre Prozesse integriert, um die Produk-tion zu steigern, Materialkosten und Stillstandszeit zu reduzieren, die Qualität zu verbessern und zu dokumentieren.

Nature of business:
ZUMBACH Electronics is one of the leading manufacturer of in-line measuring, monitoring and control systems for the wire and cable industry (from wire drawing to fiber optics, including extrusion of insulation and jackets), for the plastics and rubber induiustry (mono filaments, catheter, tubing, pipe or profiles) and for the steel and metal industry (hot and cold rolling, continuous casting, turning, grinding, polishing to QC inspection stations).
ZUMBACH instruments measure diameter (Laser Micrometers), wall thickness and concentricity (ultrasonic or eddy current principle), and detect lumps/neckdowns (optical flaw detectors). Specialized sensors monitor the capacitance of data wires and coaxial cables. - Controllers with application specific algorithms shorten start-up times, minimize scrap production and material usage. Data acquisition and FFT analysis are offered as well. A line of inductive preheaters for metal conductors, spark testers for in-line testing of the dielectric, optical surface inspection system, and in-line profile monitoring systems complete the ZUMBACH line of industrial precision equipment.
• BDO AG, Biel/Bienne

Founded in 1957, Zumbach Electronics is one of the leading manufacturers of in-line measuring, monitoring and control systems for the wire, cable, plastics, rubber, steel and metals industries. The company has more than 50 employees and serves a wide range of industrial clients in the United States, Canada, Mexico and Central America. It is located in Mount Kisco, N.Y., and is a subsidiary of Zumbach Electronic AG, a privately owned company that provides in-line measurement systems based on various technologies, such as laser, ultrasonic and X-rays. The company s product line also includes preheaters for metal conductors and spark testers for in-line testing of the dielectric components. It provides products of various brand names, including ODAC, ODEX, Cellmaster, Profilemaster, Simac, Metrex and UMAC.

allDescriptions: Kapsch TrafficCom AG provides intelligent transportation systems technologies, solutions, and services in Austria, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, the Asia-Pacific, and the Americas. The company operates through two segments, Tolling and Traffic Management. It involved in the implementation, and technical and commercial operation of toll collection systems comprising individual road sections and nation-wide road networks; provision of toll services for business and private customers; and implementation and operation of systems and solutions for traffic control and mobility behavior, as well as related components business. The company offers tolling products, such as on-board unit, roadside radio frequency system, roadside video, vehicle enforcement, smart toll, operational backoffice, image processing suite, enforcement and commercial backoffice, and geo location platform; and traffic management products, including traffic control device, roadside unit, connected vehicle platform, connected mobility control center, mobility data platform, deep learning versatile platform, mobility management platform, and advanced traffic management system. The company was founded in 1892 and is headquartered in Vienna, Austria. Kapsch TrafficCom AG is a subsidiary of KAPSCH-Group Beteiligungs GmbH.
Kapsch TrafficCom AG supplies traffic systems and electronic fee collection systems.
K-Businesscom (formerly Kapsch BusinessCom) is Austria's ICT solutions and service provider, as well as a digitalization partner.

K-Businesscom serves as a consultant, service provider, and business engineer, assisting businesses on their way to digital transformation. In the following nations, the company blends an innovative corporate culture with technology skill and industrial knowledge.

Kapsch BusinessCom – ein Unternehmen der Kapsch Group – ist mit rund 1.300 Mitarbeitern und einem Umsatz von über 300 Millionen Euro einer der führenden ICT-Servicepartner in Österreich, Zentral- und Osteuropa. Eingebettet in die Kapsch Unternehmensgruppe agiert Kapsch BusinessCom weltweit mit eigenen Niederlassungen in Österreich und mit Gesellschaften in Tschechien, Slowakei, Ungarn, Rumänien und Polen.

Das Gesamtlösungsportfolio des Unternehmens deckt sowohl Informationstechnologie als auch Telekommunikation ab. Kapsch positioniert sich daher als ICT-Servicepartner. Neben der Systemintegration und der kontinuierlichen Optimierung übernimmt Kapsch BusinessCom in immer stärker werdendem Ausmaß auch den vollständigen Betrieb dieser ICT Lösungen.
Kapsch setzt dabei auf Herstellerunabhängigkeit und Partnerschaften mit weltweit technologisch führenden Anbietern wie Apple, Mitel, Avaya, Cisco, Google, Hitachi, HP oder Microsoft. Gemeinsam mit diesen Partnern agiert Kapsch als Berater, Systemlieferant und Dienstleistungsanbieter bei seinen 17.000 Kunden, vor allem aber als verlässlicher, vertrauenswürdiger und langfristiger Trusted Advisor in einem sich rasant verändernden technologischen Umfeld.
Kapsch Aktiengesellschaft was founded in 1892. The company's line of business includes providing management services on a contract or fee basis.

Kapsch TrafficCom is a globally renowned provider of transportation solutions for sustainable mobility. Innovative solutions in the application fields of tolling, tolling services, traffic management and demand management contribute to a healthy world without congestion. Kapsch has brought projects to fruition in more than 50 countries around the globe. With one-stop solutions, the company covers the entire value chain of customers, from components to design and implementation to the operation of systems. As part of the Kapsch Group and headquartered in Vienna, Kapsch TrafficCom has subsidiaries and branches in more than 25 countries. It has been listed in the Prime Market segment of the Vienna Stock Exchange since 2007 (ticker symbol: KTCG). In its 2021/22 financial year, around 4,220 employees generated revenues of about EUR 519 million.

KAPSCH-Group Beteiligungs GmbH provides IT services. The Company offers communication technology, public transportation systems, and network enterprise solutions. KAPSCH-Group Beteiligungs serves customers worldwide.

entity.description:
We are the specialists in visual inspection and identification solutions. As a reliable and enthusiastic partner, we provide turn-key solutions tailored to your specific requirements and wishes. As an integrator, we strive to implement the best-suited solution within your existing production and packaging processes. We collaborate with you as a manufacturer or OEM, aiming for a long-term partnership for the future.

We view quality assurance as “continuous improvement,” keeping it in focus and helping to further develop it within organizations.

Our ViTrack software provides full insight into inspection data and tracks all completed inspection points. The entire system can be managed from your own workstation, with data and images stored as verifiable evidence. Thanks to our API, integration with any ERP system is seamless and straightforward. Our standard modules and machines integrate smoothly into your existing operations, forming a cohesive whole within the PackCheck data platform. Our proprietary software is fully developed in-house and is 100% suitable for industrial production processes.

With inline inspection and identification, we prevent packaging machines from jamming and ensure the correct packaging materials are used throughout the process. This helps prevent (allergen) recalls and reduces waste.

Packaging quality control

Product quality control

Product identification

Packaging identification

Verification of films, labels, and text/barcodes

Order and stock control

Automatic registration of shipments

Our goal is to enhance your customer image while reducing costs!

Feel free to contact us to discuss how these solutions can be applied to your processes and where quality assurance and improvements are possible.

We look forward to speaking with you!

entity.description: Silicann Systems develops and produces optoelectronic sensor solutions and optical inspection and measurement systems for industrial and laboratory automation. The company focuses on NIR spectrometers, including the Spektralwerk Core series for inline inspection, identification, and content analysis in process environments. It offers application software such as Spectrotron and APIs for configuring and operating its spectrometers. Silicann Systems provides engineering services covering custom optical sensor and light source design, spectrometric calibration models, and algorithm development. Its electronics services include circuit and PCB design, firmware and embedded Linux development, interface integration, and prototyping through to small-series production. These offerings target research organizations and manufacturing companies that require precise photometric, spectral, and color measurement solutions integrated into automated processes.

allDescriptions: Elma Electronic AG is a Switzerland-based company engaged in the manufacturing of electronic packaging solutions for the embedded systems market. It operates through three business segments: System Solutions; Enclosures & Components and Rotary Switches. The System Solutions business segment focuses primarily on embedded systems, such as cabinet systems, backplane modules and memory modules, which are used in medical, military and media image processing sectors, among others. The Enclosures & Components business segment offers standardized and tailored enclosures and components for industrial housing applications and electronic cabinets. The Rotary Switches business segment manufactures rotary switches and encoders for use in electronic devices. The Company operates in Europe, the Americas and Asia.
Elma Electronic is a global manufacturer of electronic packaging products for the embedded systems market.

Elma Electronic is a global manufacturer of electronic packaging products for the embedded systems market -- from components, storage boards, backplanes and chassis platforms to fully integrated subsystems.  Elma is listed on SIX (Swiss Stock Exchange), with subsidiaries in 9 countries on 3 continents. To ensure their integrated solutions are optimized to their customer’s needs, Elma partners with leading board manufactures in the industry. Elma also provides enclosure solutions to electronics companies, from cases to vertical cabinets, as well as precision components such as rotary switches/encoders, front panels, and LEDs.  The company has a broad base of proven standard products that can be tailored to individual applications, from initial concept to volume production.  Elma’s reliable solutions, flexibility, and design expertise are key reasons why the leading electronics companies in the world choose Elma time and again.
Elma Electronic is a renowned global leader in embedded computing solutions.

Elma Electronic specializes in delivering advanced embedded computing solutions that include integrated chassis systems, modular enclosures, board products, and precision hardware components. With offerings in both standard and custom configurations, Elma caters to a wide range of industries, from defense and aerospace to telecommunications and medical technology. Known for reliability, long-term support, and exceptional technical expertise, Elma ensures that clients receive top-tier engineering solutions designed to meet the most demanding operational requirements
Design and manufacture embedded rugged computers and enclosure solutions based on open architectures and open standards such as OpenVPX, SOSA, VME, CompactPCI, COM Express and others.

Optima Stantron, an Elma company, is a designer and manufacturer of cabinets for use in defense amd industrial applications, and command and control consoles. The company operates from a 130,000 sq.feet manufacturing, engineering and sales facility just north of Atlanta, Georgia.

Founded in 1986, Elma Electronic designs and manufactures electronic enclosures, open standards-based embedded computing platforms and electro-mechanical components. Elma has achieved a leading position in open standards architectures (OpenVPX, SOSA, VNX+, VME, CompactPCI / CPCI Serial, COMe, and small form factor) and rugged COTS enclosures.

Elma's customers can be found in defense and aerospace, communications, railway, test, automation and industrial control.

Elma Electronic makes enclosure platforms for embedded systems and electronic equipment -- from electro-mechanical components, embedded boards, backplanes and chassis platforms, 19” racks, to integrated subsystems. Elma’s partner offerings help optimize the solution for a project’s needs.

Elma also provides enclosure solutions, from small cases to vertical cabinets, and high-precision components such as aluminum panels and card guides, switches/encoders, knobs, and LED assemblies. The company’s broad base of modular, standard products is tailored to each application, from initial concept to production. Elma’s reliability, flexibility, and design expertise are key reasons why leading companies worldwide choose Elma time and again.

Elma Electronic AG manufactures and sells electronic packaging products for the embedded systems market worldwide. It offers backplanes, cabinets, chassis platforms, embedded boards, embedded computing systems, enclosures and components, power solutions, and rotary switches. The company also provides conformal coating, front panels, and online configurator services. It serves aerospace, defense, artificial intelligence, industrial automation, medical, science and research, test and measurement, and transportation industries. Elma Electronic AG was founded in 1960 and is headquartered in Wetzikon, Switzerland.

ACT/Technico, founded in 1978, is the combination of Technico, a sales division which represents and distributes products from leading industry manufacturers and Advanced Control Technology, a design services, integration and manufacturing firm. It provides integrated embedded solutions such as Versa Module Eurocard and compact peripheral component interconnect-based products, single board computers, mass storage and networking devices, adapters, carriers, field programmable gate-array boards and mezzanine modules. The company offers a wide range of engineering services including driver development and ruggedization. It has partnered with various companies such as Dynatem, Elma, Interface, Motorola, Hybricon and Interphase. Certified to ISO 9001:2000, it supplies its products and services to companies in defense, aerospace, semiconductor equipment, transportation, communications and medical industries. ACT/Technico has a 24,000-square-foot facility located in Warminster, Pa.

ELMA Electronic AG designs and manufactures a wide range of modular control electronic frames, panels and casings, as well as back-plane connector systems and miniature switches for control electronic systems in computers, telecommunication gears and other electronic equipment.  The Company operates subsidiaries in Europe and the United States.

Founded in 1986, Elma Electronic designs and manufactures a range of solutions in electronics packaging. It serves the medical, defense, telecommunication, electronics and aerospace industries. The company stocks an inventory of more than 20,000 parts, including enclosures, cabinets, instrument cases, encoders, universal terminals, switch jacks, switches and knobs. It provides system design, validation, peripheral installation, software loading, thermal analysis, vibration testing and manufacturing services. Elma Electronic also offers wire harness fabrication, circuit termination, compliance testing, and packaging and shipping services. It utilizes a variety of equipment that includes variable system load cards, error velocity sensors and thermal couples. The company is a part of Elma Group, which is headquartered in Wetzikon, Switzerland. Elma Group operates several production facilities in the United States, Switzerland, Germany, Romania and Great Britain.
Public company

Elma Electronic is a publicly traded Swiss electronics company founded in 1960 and based in Wetzikon, Switzerland. The company has 5 product divisions: Systems Platforms, Backplanes, Enclosures & Components, Rotary Switches, and Cabinet Enclosures. The largest segment is systems packaging serving the military, aerospace, homeland security, medical and industrial markets. The Elma Bustronic division develops backplanes, including VME320, which was the world's fastest VME backplane in 1997. Elma Bustronic also develops backplanes in OpenVPX, VMEbus, VME64X, CompactPCI, MicroTCA, and custom bus structures. Elma is an executive member of the PCI Industrial Computer Manufacturers Group (PICMG), VME International Trade Association, and member of the OpenVPX Industry Working Standards Group.

Another company might develop some high-tech gadget, but Elma Electronic makes the container to hold it snug and the glowing light-emitting diode (LED) component to tell you if it's turned on. The company produces computer enclosures and components, backplanes, power supplies, fans, and systems platforms. It also makes switches, knobs, and LEDs for electronics, and provides design, engineering, and manufacturing services. Elma Electronic was founded in 1960.

Elma Electronic thinks your electronics equipment should be contained, not your enthusiasm. The US subsidiary of Elma Electronic AG manufactures and distributes an array of electronic enclosures, backplanes, and server racks. It also makes passive electronic components, from rotary switches to knobs and light-emitting diodes. Elma Electronic's slate of services includes component customization, design, engineering, manufacture, systems integration, and verification. Subsidiary Elma Bustronic offers custom backplane applications, and Optima EPS makes electronic enclosures. The company courts industries worldwide in telecommunications, medical electronics, industrial control, defense, and aerospace.

Nature of business:
Elma Electronic is a global manufacturer of electronic packaging products for the embedded systems market -- from components, storage boards, backplanes and chassis platforms to fully integrated subsystems.

(Deutsche Seite: https://www.linkedin.com/company/elma-electronic-ag/) Elma Electronic is a leader in open standards based backplanes, modular enclosures, cabinets, and sub-system assemblies and integration. Elma’s modular approach enables fast, cost-effective, and proven performance based on standard, modular platforms - 19" chassis, ATR and small form factor designs. Elma is a leader in open computing architectures - OpenVPX, SOSA™, CompactPCI Serial, COMe, PCI/104, and others, actively participating in the standards working groups. Elma’s cultivated ecosystem provides the right choice of products for tailored system solutions. Find out why so many companies rely on Elma for trusted embedded solutions. Our Optima Stantron brand manufactures modular & custom racks for defense & industrial solutions. We offer an extensive line of smart, modular instrument cases, enclosures and accessories. Elma also manufactures precision rotary switches, encoders and audio solutions used in critical & emergency radios to the highest quality audio systems found in today's studios. Note: Many of our standard products are available for online purchase. Find out more details on our website.

Elma Electronic is a global company, founded in 1960, that designs and manufactures solutions for electronics packaging.
The company provides standard to fully customized components such as modular enclosures, cabinets and backplanes up to complete system integration.
Elma also manufactures precision rotary switches for the military and civil solutions.
Elma Electronic Israel established in 1997, is a member of the Elma group. Elma Israel offers design to spec systems for a variety of environment specifications and markets, such as Military, Communications, Medical and Industrial. Elma IL also offers all Elma's production to the Israeli market
The company has extensive practical knowledge and offers a fast, flexible response to customer needs by tailoring solutions to specific applications.

FiveCo provides engineering services covering mechanics, electronics, embedded software, image processing, design, and craftsmanship. It handles projects that combine mechanical and electronic design, such as ultra-low power embedded systems, sensors, actuators, and firmware. The company also develops user interfaces, mobile applications, and industrial prototypes for sectors like medical, automotive, robotics, watchmaking, and luxury. Notre équipe multidisciplinaire vous délivre un service de qualité pour l’outsourcing de vos projets, quel que soit le secteur d’activité de votre entreprise.

L'ingénierie innovante est l'essence même de FiveCo. Nous innovons pour vous, nous innovons par passion, nous innovons par tradition.

allDescriptions: Elbit Vision Systems provides technical fabric in the industries of automotive, medical/hygiene, home textiles, apparel, and composites.

EVS provides the technical fabrics industry with Automatic Optical Inspection (AOI) systems suitable for quality inspection in the production processes of a variety of technical fabrics. A consistent set of hardware components is implemented in different processes by applying a different set of software parameters. Increased accuracy, improved quality and decreased labor and costs are some of the advantages.

Elbit Vision Systems Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, designs, develops, manufactures, and markets automatic vision inspection and quality monitoring systems worldwide. The company offers vision inspection systems, such as IQ-TEX for the visual inspection and quality monitoring of woven fabrics; and IQ-TEX Lite for the visual inspection and quality monitoring of knitted, non-woven, tire cord, film, metal, coated, and technical fabrics. Its vision inspection systems also include Broken Filaments Analyzer for the detection of broken filament defects in glass fabric; and On Loom Inspection, an automatic visual quality inspection system that monitors selected fabric types, such as carbon, t...

Elbit Vision Systems Ltd. designs, develops, manufactures, markets, and supports automatic vision inspection and quality monitoring systems.  The Company's systems are designed to improve the detection of defects in the manufacturing process.  Elbit's products include a family of systems for the textile and fabric industry.

KG wurde 1982 gegründet und hat sich zu einem namhaften Produzenten von Industrie-PCs und Lieferanten von Produkten rund um industrielle und ... industrienahe Computeranwendungen in Deutschland entwickelt. Die Aktivitäten von Spectra umfassen den Handel mit Komponenten für die Mess- und Automatisierungstechnik sowie die Entwicklung und Herstellung industrieller PC-Systeme. Mit dem Ziel, eine flächendeckende, optimale und vor allem kundennahe Betreuung des deutschsprachigen Raumes zu gewährleisten, wurde im Jahre 2004 eine Tochterfirma in der Schweiz, die Spectra Schweiz AG eröffnet. In Jahr 2006 folgte eine Niederlassung in Österreich. Marketing, Wareneinkauf, zahlreiche Logistikaufgaben sowie Entwicklungs- und Qualitätssicherungsmaßnahmen werden zentral am Stammsitz in Reutlingen abgewickelt. Dort befindet sich auch das große Zentrallager mit über 45.000 Produkten, das sehr schnelle Lieferzeiten sicherstellt. --------------------------------------------------------- See More Products - Industrie-PC Systeme - IPC-Komponenten - Industrielle Kommunikationstechnik - Automation

Spectra is an owner-managed company in the field of industrial PC and automation. Our customers come from almost all industrial sectors. Our services in the industrial PC area include the development and production of individual, customer-specific industrial PC systems, even in small quantities. We integrate new technical developments into our existing product range for the benefit of our customers. For example, we work with our customers on the topic of Industry 4.0 & IIoT to develop complete packages consisting of consulting, IIoT products, configuration and programming. Another new feature is the integration of voice control solutions in our industrial PCs, which allows a completely new type of interaction between man and machine. High-performance computers for applications in image processing or for AI solutions round off the portfolio. Good service, technical competence as well as more than 40 years of experience in this marketplace are the foundations of our steady growth. Our core competencies are the development and production of complex and technically sophisticated industrial PC systems as well as the distribution of high-quality components for measurement/automation and network technology. With the aim of ensuring comprehensive, optimal and, above all, customer-oriented support for the German-speaking region, a subsidiary was opened in Switzerland in 2004. In 2006 a subsidiary in Wels in Austria followed. Marketing, goods purchasing, numerous logistics tasks as well as development and quality assurance measures are handled centrally at the headquarters in Reutlingen. The large central warehouse is also located there, which ensures very fast delivery times.

The Spectra GmbH & Co. KG has many years of experience in the fields of industrial PCs, industrial communication and automation. Our services in the industrial PC sector include consulting, development and production of individual industrial PC systems, even in small quantities. In the field of Industry 4.0 & IIoT we work with our customers to develop a complete package consisting of consulting, IIoT products, configuration and programming.

entity.description: Affix Engineering provides engineering services focused on industrial robot programming, machine vision solutions, AI and autonomous systems, and process optimization. The company programs robots from multiple brands for applications such as welding, pick and place, palletizing, assembly, and material handling. It designs and integrates 2D and 3D machine vision for inspection, quality control, bin picking, flex feeding, conveyor tracking, and depalletizing. Affix Engineering also develops custom software and AI-based automation to support decision-making and intelligent systems. Its engineers work with system integrators, machine builders, and end customers across sectors including automotive, food, technology, aerospace, pharmaceuticals, logistics, wood, and metalworking.

entity.summary: Specialist in robotics and machine vision
allDescriptions:
Affix Engineering is a specialist in programming industrial robots and has a goal to make the use of robots easier and more accessible. With years of experience and in-depth knowledge in the field of robotics and machine vision, Affix Engineering is able give everyone the tools and expertise for robot automation and machine vision. 

This is especially of great value for small and medium-sized businesses (MKB), where companies often do not have sufficient experience with robots and vision equipment. Because Affix also supports and advises the smaller and less wealthy companies in the implementation of automation solutions, these companies (including integrators and machine builders) can enjoy new and innovative technical solutions without any worries.

We are brand independent and familiar with most brands and systems. Through the development of software packages and various R&D processes, we are used to complex tasks, we can solve problems, improve processes and work with other people's software.

With approximately 8 programmers, Affix is working on various large and small projects for different customers in all imaginable branches, including: Automotive, Food, Technology, Aerospace, Pharmaceuticals, Logistics, Metal, ... . By working together as a team, with each other and with our partners, Affix is from the beginning of a project a real addition.

Affix Engineering B.V.
Bedrijfsweg 13
5683CM Best
The Netherlands

Averna provides engineering services. The Company offers a full range of test engineering services for every stage of the product lifecycle from product design through manufacturing and repair.

As a global Test & Quality Solution leader, Averna partners with product designers, developers and OEMs to help them achieve higher product quality and accelerate time to market. Founded in 1999, Averna offers specialized expertise and innovative test, vision inspection, precision assembly and automated solutions that deliver substantial technical, financial and market benefits for clients in the automotive and EV, life-science, battery, consumer electronics, industrial, telecom, transportation, and aerospace and defense industries. Averna has offices around the world, numerous certifications such as ISO, is ITAR registered and is partnered with NI, PI (Physik Instrumente), Eclipse Automation, Keysight Technologies and JOT Automation.

“Our clients are changing how the world works, travels and communicates. And we’re right there with them – demonstrating the full power and true potential of Test.” – François Rainville, President & CEO

As a global Test & Quality Solution leader, Averna partners with product designers, developers and OEMs to help them achieve higher product quality, accelerate time to market and protect their brands. Founded in 1999, Averna offers specialized expertise and innovative test, vision inspection, precision assembly and automated solutions that deliver substantial technical, financial and market benefits for clients in the automotive and EV, life-science, battery, consumer electronics, industrial, telecom, transportation, and aerospace and defense industries. Averna has offices around the world, numerous industry certifications such as ISO and is ITAR registered. 

Our everyday actions rest on 4 pillars representing Averna’s core values: teamwork and commitment, innovation and knowledge, performance and leadership and customer satisfaction. We offer:

• Our Services: We offer a full range of Test Engineering services and automated test equipment for every stage of the product lifecycle – from design and NPI through production and repair.

• Our Products: We put hard-earned expertise, technical innovation and extensive R&D into leading off-the-shelf test solutions that deliver substantial ROI and garner industry awards.

• Our Expertise: We help drive client success with our deep know-how in automation, RF, Design for Test, machine vision, battery test, broadband, NI TestStand/LabVIEW, FPGAs, fixturing, robotics, build-to-print, and more.

• Our Team: We are over 1200+ test engineers, system architects, hardware specialists, software developers, project managers and other professionals, including partners like NI, PI, Eclipse Automation, Keysight and JOT.

Averna Technologies Inc. provides test solutions for communications and electronics device-makers worldwide. It offers RF instruments and tools, such as RF records and playbacks, RF players and signal generators, multi-channel RF records and playbacks, multi-channel compact RF recorders, RF players for GNSS, and RF studio software. The company also provides test engineering, build-to-print, test support, and professional services. It serves aerospace and defense, automotive transportation, consumer electronic, life science, and telecom infrastructure industries. Averna Technologies Inc. was founded in 1999 and is based in Montreal, Canada with additional offices worldwide. It has sales, mark...

Test & Measurement Solutions SA provides testing and measurement services. The Company offers feasibility studies, consulting, engineering, vision inspection, condition monitoring, and precision assembly services. Test & Measurement Solutions conducts its business worldwide.

“Our clients are changing how the world works, travels and communicates. And we’re right there with them - demonstrating the full power and true potential of Test.” - André Gareau, Executive Chairman

Founded in 1999, Averna is a Test Engineering leader, delivering innovative test expertise and quality solutions for numerous clients in wide-ranging industries around the world. Our solutions facilitate brand protection, accelerate time to market, and reduce test costs.

• Our Services: We offer a full range of Test Engineering services and automated test equipment for every stage of the product lifecycle - from design and NPI through production and repair.

• Our Products: We put hard-earned expertise, technical innovation and extensive R&D into leading off-the-shelf test solutions that deliver substantial ROI and garner industry awards.

• Our Expertise: We help drive client success with our deep know-how in automation, RF, Design for Test,  GPS/GNSS, broadband, PXI, NI TestStand/LabVIEW, FPGAs, fixturing, robotics, build-to-print, and more.

• Our Clients: We place great value on our long-lasting partnerships with customers in sectors like aerospace, automotive, consumer electronics, defense, life sciences, telecom, and transportation.

• Our Team: We are test engineers, system architects, hardware specialists, software developers, project managers and other professionals, including partners like Keysight, JOT and National Instruments.

Averna is a full-service test engineering company that uses software, hardware and customized solutions. It works with various original equipment manufacturers. The privately owned company also provides on-demand engineering services. Founded in 1999, Averna maintains locations in Canada, Europe and Asia. It has a staff of more than 220 employees. In addition, the company serves clients in the telecommunications, automotive, aerospace and electronic industries. Averna has achieved ISO 9001:2000 certification. Its subsidiaries include DAQTron and Mindready Solutions. The company s Proligent is a test engineering platform that simplifies the design and maintenance of test systems. Averna also offers automated functional test and data acquisition systems.

allDescriptions: Spigraph is a provider of document capture and processing solutions.
Systhen provides digital document transformation solutions.

Systhen is a distributor and integrator of digital document transformation solutions, placing electronic document management. They provide services audit, facility, maintenance for Inheritance, service providers, health, administration and communities, transportation, and immovable sectors. They offer capture and processing incoming flows, collaboration and information life, and archiving, security and distribution.

Spigraph manufactures office electronics products. The Company offers scanners and image capture solutions, as well as software. Spigraph also provides installation, training, invoice processing, and digital services. Spigraph serves customers worldwide.

Spigraph is one of the leading providers of document capture and processing solutions. In addition to its portfolio of document scanners from the world’s leading manufacturers, Spigraph supports its customers in automating business processes and generating operational efficiencies through digital transformation. As a value-added distributor, Spigraph offers a full range of services, from consulting and implementation services to scanner maintenance and support.

Headquartered in St-Quentin-Fallavier (France), and with sales and service organisations across 15 countries in Europe and Africa, Spigraph serves more than 6,000 authorised partners and 40,000 customers in over 40 countries.

Learn more about the value of document capture for your organisation by contacting us at www.spigraph.com.

Since Spigraph was created, scanning has been its core activity. As a distributor, Spigraph now references one of the widest ranges of professional scanners and capture and image processing software. Spigraph's expertise is expressed through customised follow-up in the choice, implementation and use of these scanning solutions.

Document imaging solutions distributor - Professional document scanners - (Canon, Fujitsu, Kodak, Panasonic...), software integration, development and distribution, consulting and after sales services : Assessment, installation, training, integration, configuration, technical hotline, Factory returns, on-site services and equipment fleet management.

entity.name: nLIGHT plasmo
entity.description: nLIGHT Plasmo is technology leader in the field of quality assurance solutions for automated metalworking production. We are an innovative company specialized in the area of quality assurance. While our headquarter nLIGHT GmbH is based in Vienna, we maintain a worldwide network of branches and partners. nLIGHT GmbH delivers plasmo quality assurance solutions that enable our customers to implement a secure, efficient and cost-optimized production. Our expertise ranges from monitoring of welding processes, control of weld seams, geometric shapes and surfaces up to tailored solutions in the field of machine vision and analysis software. A wide range of comprehensive engineering services rounds off the portfolio. The expert team assists its customers from the moment the control task is defined until implementation of the control system.

entity.description: Aspect Systems supports test solutions with specific expertise for image sensors and cameras. Their business are part solutions as well as turn key systems for development, qualification and production. Depending on your project requirements we support engineering services, test & measurement services, components and equipment.aSpect Systems specialized products are combined with cost effective industrial 3rd party parts and extended by custom specific developments to meet industries demands of effective and reliable applications.  It is your specialist for industrial imaging and test solutions. They cover the disciplines electronics, mechanics, optics, image data processing and automation to compose the best fitted solution for your requirements.
