allDescriptions: Aspect Systems is your specialist for industrial imaging and test solutions.

Aspect Systems supports test solutions with specific expertise for image sensors and cameras. Their business are part solutions as well as turn key systems for development, qualification and production. Depending on your project requirements we support engineering services, test & measurement services, components and equipment.aSpect Systems specialized products are combined with cost effective industrial 3rd party parts and extended by custom specific developments to meet industries demands of effective and reliable applications.  It is your specialist for industrial imaging and test solutions. They cover the disciplines electronics, mechanics, optics, image data processing and automation to compose the best fitted solution for your requirements.

Our main business segments are “Development Services”, “Supply Chain Management”, “Test Services” and “Automation- & Test Equipment”. We utilize our technologies to support clients who design, manufacture and deploy semiconductors, imaging devices and opto-electronics. The keys to support our portfolio relies on an team with passion for technology and long-time experience in the fields of Automation-, Hardware-, Software-, Mechanics-, Optics- and Illumination- Development, as well as the related outsourced Manufacturing (Supply Chain Management). Our in-house test floor supports test equipment for production testing, characterization and qualification of Wafers, ICs and Opto-Electronics . Last but not least we have electronic and mechanic manufacturing capabilities for prototyping.

entity.description: minCam GmbH designs and produces camera systems. The Company offers sliding camera systems for the inspection of fresh water and sewers, as well as optical inspection systems for cavity and industrial inspection. minCam serves customers in Germany.

ultimateParent.summary: Financial services company based in Bad Homburg, Hesse State, Germany
ultimateParent.name: HARALD QUANDT INDUSTRIEBETEI

descriptors: control, electromedical, measuring and navigational instruments manufacturing
allDescriptions: MinCam designs and manufactures camera systems for various applications, including optical pipe inspection, boreholes, sewers, and plumbing.

minCam GmbH designs and produces camera systems. The Company offers sliding camera systems for the inspection of fresh water and sewers, as well as optical inspection systems for cavity and industrial inspection. minCam serves customers in Germany.

minCam GmbH is a leading company in the field of optical pipe-inspection systems. minCam owns an incomparable product portfolio and the products are designed cost efficient through a common platform as the automotive industry does.

Thanks to the platform strategy, which is a real added value for our customers, the products are highly individualizable, enabling minCam to offer customized solutions to its clients. This concept is also implemented in new products, which enables minCam to reduce the development period and reduce the cost.

The company was founded with the clear vision to offer our customers easy to use and robust optical pipe-inspection systems with a variety of options to configure the camera inspection system according the individual needs of our customers.

Camera systems for the optical inspection of well water, fresh water, sewage water, for cavity inspection, for mechanical engineering, plant construction, facade engineering inspections, for inspections of swimming pools, air heatings, chimneys, furnaces and heat exchangers; camera head diameter from 13 mm - 55 mm, GRP push rod, trailing cable, push-pull cable, torsion cable with various inspection and recording devices. The ideal partner for appraisers, pipe fitters and inspectors

entity.description: FSI is a regional leader that locally maintains inventory for your HVAC filtration products, supplies all Industrial Products, and provides the highest quality filter change-out service at an affordable cost. We not only stock and supply filtration related products from the world's leading filter manufacturers for virtually any application, we also offer scheduled filter change-out service and condenser coil cleaning. Based in Chicago and family owned, FSI is committed to quality products, expert technical support, timely delivery, and personal dedication to our customers. FSI provides highest quality, affordable, Commercial and Industrial Air Filter Change-Out Services, in addition to Coil Cleaning. Our service team offers a variety of maintenance schedules to meet your needs, providing services for over 5,000 accounts in the Greater Chicago area. The boundaries of our service area extend from Chicago: North to Milwaukee/Madison, South to Champaign/Decatur, West to the Quad Cities, and East to South Bend. FSI's filter service on a regular cycle is an extension of the normal HVAC preventative maintenance program. (Note: FSI is not an HVAC maintenance contractor). During our Filter Change-Out Service, our service technicians perform a visual inspection of the HVAC system and report any problems or recommendations to ensure proper operations for your facility. Our service cycle can be tailored to meet customer needs and requirements from a weekly, monthly, quarterly, or yearly Filter Change-Out cycle. Pick up your HVAC filters and V-Belts today! Immediate filter availability. You will be in-and-out the door in less than 9 minutes! Type in "Filter Services"​ in Google Maps and press Start Navigation.

Filter Services is a distributor of commercial and industrial filtration products for air, liquid, compressor, and dust collection systems.

Filter Services provides HVAC and air filtration, dust collection, water and liquid filtration, compressed air filtration, hydraulic fluid filtration, lubrication filtration, ammonia filtration, natural gas and oil filtration, paint filtration, industrial and commercial condenser coil cleaning, dust collector leak detection, dirty element analysis, and more services. Their products are natural gas and oil filtration, dust and liquid filtration, industrial filtration and products, and HVAC air filtration products.

FSI is an HVAC and Industrial Filtration products distributor and HVAC Service Company. Additional Services include, Indoor Air Quality Facility Assessments, Air Quality Particle Testing, V-Belt Supply, Proactive Order Management and Delivery System, Condenser Coil Cleaning Service, custom commercial UV Systems and Cottonwood Screens Installation.

allDescriptions: Excellence and innovation: that is the commitment of DMT GROUP as an independent, globally active engineering services and consulting company specialising in the markets of plant and process engineering, infrastructure and civil engineering, natural resources, and energy. The goal of DMT GROUP is to create sustainable value for its clients through a full-service engineering and consultancy offering led by knowledge, digitalisation and internationalisation. DMT GROUP is headquartered in Essen, Germany, and maintains 13 engineering and consulting companies at 30 locations worldwide. DMT GROUP leads the engineering division of TÜV NORD GROUP, contributing more than 280 years of experience and working and acting in the spirit of partnership and trust to realise hundreds of projects around the globe every year. DMT GROUP’s approach is defined by being solution-orientated and sustainable, ensuring value creation and client success under the guiding principle of Engineering Performance. DMT GmbH & Co. KG, through its subsidiaries, provides engineering, testing, and consulting services globally. It offers services in the areas of mining, exploration and geo-survey, civil and geotechnical consulting, geo engineering, industrial testing and measuring technology, international mining consulting, coke making technology, product testing, and building safety. entity.description: Future Maintenance Technologies delivers AI-enabled robotics and digital systems that automate inspection and maintenance of rail and other critical assets. The company develops solutions such as the Automated Rail Infrastructure Inspection System (ARIIS), which captures and analyses infrastructure data to support condition monitoring and defect detection. Its platforms integrate sensors, machine vision and analytics to reduce manual track walks and improve maintenance planning. Service offerings include asset management consulting, implementation of digital maintenance systems, and support for global automated maintenance programs. Future Maintenance Technologies collaborates with rail operators and infrastructure owners to embed robotics into existing workflows, helping transition from reactive to predictive maintenance strategies.

allDescriptions: Future Maintenance Technologies provides AI-driven robotics for automated rail and asset maintenance operations.

Future Maintenance Technologies delivers AI-enabled robotics and digital systems that automate inspection and maintenance of rail and other critical assets. The company develops solutions such as the Automated Rail Infrastructure Inspection System (ARIIS), which captures and analyses infrastructure data to support condition monitoring and defect detection. Its platforms integrate sensors, machine vision and analytics to reduce manual track walks and improve maintenance planning. Service offerings include asset management consulting, implementation of digital maintenance systems, and support for global automated maintenance programs. Future Maintenance Technologies collaborates with rail operators and infrastructure owners to embed robotics into existing workflows, helping transition from reactive to predictive maintenance strategies.

Future Maintenance Technologies is an AI and Robotics Maintenance Technology provider. Our vision is to be the world’s leading robotics organisation for autonomous inspection and maintenance capability globally.
 
Through strategic collaborations with OEMs, clients, and industry stakeholders, we are committed to shaping the future of maintenance.
 
Together, we aim to facilitate the global transition towards safer, more efficient, and sustainable critical infrastructure systems.

entity.description:
The Imago Group  is the largest channel for video communication in Europe, with a product offering that spans from video conferencing, cloud computing, digital signage, streaming, audio conferencing, IPTV, LCD displays, and interactive whiteboard technology. In addition to being the largest video-comunications equipment and infrastructure distributor in EMEA, the Imago Group Benelux works closely with several other notable vendors in order to provide our resellers with a complete solution that is tailored to their needs.
Our strategic vendor partnerships include; Avaya/Radvision, NEC, Samsung, Sony, eBeam, Revolabs, CBS, Unicol, Amino, Viewcast, Watchitoo and Chief. Imago also offer services from Deutsche Telekom and have strategic relationships with IBM and Microsoft.

Here are some reasons to partner with us:

• The Imago Group is represented in 8 countries around the globe. 

• Each country has access  to demo facilities, warehousing, sales and engineering services.

• Each account manager is a sales specialist, who has been highly trained enabling them to offer you the best advice.

•Impromp2u is our service division who offer Installation service and full pre/post sales support team.

• Our Group delivers unique marketing and sales programs and provide exceptional financial and technical support to accelerate the business of our partners

• We are also a distributor for Machine Vision products CCD en CMOS camera’s, optics, frame grabbers,lighting, cables, and software.
